fields.name: Production BOM No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the production BOM number that the comment refers to.
The program copies the production BOM number from the Production BOM No. field on the Production BOM Line.

fields.name: BOM Line No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the consecutive number of the BOM line to which the comment refers.
The program copies the BOM line number from the Line No. field on the Production BOM Line.

fields.name: Line No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the line number.
The program uses the line number for the internal management of comment lines.

fields.name: Version Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the version code of the Production BOM line that this comment line refers to.
The program copies the version code from the Version Code field on the Production BOM Line.

fields.name: Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the comment was created.

fields.name: Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a code for the comments.
